title: gitgecko Plug Manifest v1
description: Editor-validation JSON Schema for plug.manifest.json. The runtime source-of-truth is the Zod schema at packages/socket/src/manifest.ts (manifestSchema). This file mirrors the Zod shape for IDE red-squiggle validation per the Continue dual-source pattern (P-frontend-11). If the two ever diverge, the Zod schema wins (it is what the registry enforces). Implements .docs/todo/system-design/03-plugin-socket-contract.md §2.

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Must match MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION in packages/socket/src/manifest.ts.

id.description: Plug id — kebab-case, globally unique, stable across versions.

owner.description: Owner name (validated against OwnerName by the registry, not here). One of: model, review, code-intel, rules, billing, mcp-gateway, sandbox, commands.

version.description: Plug's own semver version (independent of schemaVersion).

capabilities.description: Non-empty subset of the owner's capability enum. Exact tokens validated by the registry (each owner declares its own enum — 03 §4).

requires.description: Hard deps — must be active before this plug loads (topo order, 03 §8).

recommends.description: Soft deps — load if present, do not fail if absent.

schema.description: Path/ref to the plug's own JSON Schema for its config. Validated before activate().

network.description: Allowed network endpoints (host:port). Empty = no network.

filesystem.description: Allowed filesystem paths (globs). Empty = no FS access.

env.description: Required env vars. Empty = no env needed.

mutatesTools.description: Manifest-side mirror of the mutates flag (P-plugin-7). If true, every mutating tool must carry mutates:true and the derived deny list is non-empty (throws if empty — 03 §6 invariant).

entrypoint.description: Relative path to the plug's entrypoint module (e.g. ./plug.ts). Must export setup() and match the manifest.

hooks.description: Does this plug attach a HookBag (beforeRun/afterRun/beforeTool/afterTool)? Only if true.

mcp.description: Does this plug expose an MCP server surface?
